title: Quantum Sampling Applications in Finance, Physics, and ML
description: Explore real-world applications of quantum sampling algorithms in finance (option pricing, risk analysis), physics (quantum simulation, partition functions), and machine learning (Boltzmann machines, generative models).
learningObjectives: Apply quantum Monte Carlo to financial derivative pricing
Use quantum sampling for physics simulations and partition function estimation
Implement quantum-enhanced machine learning sampling techniques
Analyze the practical requirements and limitations for real-world applications
Compare quantum and classical approaches for specific use cases
